creator: pete@twisted.org.uk
text:
I have the new_xorg repository configured as well as the standard.

pkg search xf86-video-ati
xf86-video-ati-6.14.6_4
xf86-video-ati-7.2.0_4

pkg version -Rv | grep  xf86-video-ati
xf86-video-ati-7.2.0_4             >   succeeds remote (remote has 6.14.6_4)

It looks like pkg version -R is picking up the original repository as the default not second one.
